MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shoshana Raphael (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Inam Shami.
Devin Courteau (415-986-5900) for Defendant/Moving party AZ DESIGN & ENGINEERING.

Not argued. Counsel presented a proposed form of order that parties have agreed upon. The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT AZ DESIGN & ENGINEERING, INC.'s MOTION To Reopen Discovery And To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery; And For Sanctions is DENIED in part. Motion to Compel Further Responses it DENIED. Motion is untimely. Parties present an order for execution regarding the dates and sequence of expert and city witnesses depositions. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
